name: impact-preview --format json emits machine-parseable JSON with the per-rule recommendation field per F-6
command: mkdir -p tree && printf 'eval(0)\n' > tree/x.js && printf '%s' '{"rules":[{"id":"r","detector":"grep -n eval || true"}]}' > r.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/impact-preview.sh" --rule-file r.json --root tree --format json 2>out.txt && node -e 'const a=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.txt","utf8").split("\n").find(l=>l.startsWith("[")));process.exit(a[0].recommendation?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
